overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage inside a medieval fantasy tavern (The Three Broomsticks), featuring a female character standing among wooden tables and balconies with warm candlelight ambiance. The character briefly raises their hand in a gesture while observing the tavern interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval tavern interior with upper balcony and stone fireplace

events.description: game interaction prompt icon briefly appears at bottom center of screen indicating available interaction
character raises right hand in a casting or interaction gesture toward the tavern interior

agents.ego_description: standing still in the tavern main hall, facing the fireplace and upper balcony, occasionally shifting weight

notable_agents.action: standing on upper balcony overlooking the main tavern floor
sitting at table near the fireplace in conversation

entered.detail: wooden sign with gold lettering reading 'THE THREE BROOMSTICKS' mounted on the upper balcony
wooden railing with vertical posts on the upper level overlooking the main floor
large circular iron chandelier with multiple candle holders hanging from ceiling
arched stone fireplace with wooden mantelpiece on the far wall
burning fire inside the stone fireplace casting warm orange light
rustic wooden dining tables with benches scattered throughout the tavern
several framed portraits and paintings hanging on the wooden wall
wall-mounted lantern-style lights providing warm illumination

segments.scene_description: The scene takes place inside a cozy medieval tavern with warm candlelight and a large stone fireplace burning in the background. The player character stands in the main hall facing the upper balcony where 'The Three Broomsticks' sign is prominently displayed. NPCs occupy the space including one standing on the balcony and others seated near the fire. The character briefly raises their hand in a gesture while an interaction prompt appears on screen.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady perspective within a cozy medieval tavern, focusing on the warm atmosphere of the main hall and its architectural details. It begins with the camera facing the interior space, where a large stone fireplace burns brightly in the background and candlelight casts a soft glow over the room. As the view settles, the camera observes NPCs seated by the fire and another standing on an upper balcony beneath a prominent sign for The Three Broomsticks. The scene then focuses on the player character, who briefly raises their hand in a gesture as an interaction prompt appears on the screen.
